```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement security monitoring and alerting"
---
# Security Monitoring
## Task
Set up security monitoring and alerting.
## Requirements
1. Monitor for failed authentication spikes. 2. Alert on privilege escalation.
3. Detect unusual data access patterns. 4. Monitor for known attack signatures.
5. Integrate with SIEM platform.
## Constraints
- Alert on high-confidence signals only (reduce fatigue). P1 alerts notify immediately.
## Success Criteria
- Security events monitored. Alerts actionable. False positive rate < 5%. SIEM integrated.
```
